SEARCH
Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment

Class AbstractTemporalPunishment

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.AbstractPunishment
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.AbstractTemporalPunishment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Punishment, TemporalPunishment, ReasonHolder
Direct Known Subclasses:
ChainedPunishment, NecrifyBan, NecrifyMute
public abstract class AbstractTemporalPunishment extends AbstractPunishment implements TemporalPunishment

  • Method Details

    • getDuration

      @NotNull public @NotNull PunishmentDuration getDuration()
      Description copied from interface: TemporalPunishment
      Returns the duration of this punishment. This only provides information about when the punishment will end, not its creation time.
      Specified by:
      getDuration in interface TemporalPunishment
      Returns:
      the duration of the underlying punishment

    • isOngoing

      public boolean isOngoing()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Determines whether the expiration of this punishment is after LocalDateTime.now() or not.
      Specified by:
      isOngoing in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      true, if the expiration date is after now, otherwise false

    • getReason

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getReason()
      Description copied from interface: ReasonHolder
      Gets the reason of this punishment. All placeholders will be replaced with their actual values.
      Specified by:
      getReason in interface ReasonHolder
      Overrides:
      getReason in class AbstractPunishment
      Returns:
      the reason of this punishment as as component

    • change

      @NotNull public final @NotNull CompletableFuture<Punishment> change(@NotNull @NotNull PunishmentDuration newDuration, @Nullable @Nullable LocalDateTime creationTime, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component newReason) throws PunishmentException
      Description copied from interface: TemporalPunishment
      Changes the duration and reason of this punishment. This method can be used if a player created an appeal an it was accepted.
      Specified by:
      change in interface TemporalPunishment
      Parameters:
      newDuration - the new duration of the punishment (relative to the point of punishment issuance)
      creationTime - the new creation time of the punishment, or null if it should remain the same
      newReason - the new reason which should be displayed to the player, or null if it should remain the same
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the new punishment
      Throws:
      PunishmentException
      See Also:
      • Punishment.cancel()
      • TemporalPunishment.change(Component)

    • applyCancellation

      protected CompletableFuture<Punishment> applyCancellation() throws PunishmentException
      Overrides:
      applyCancellation in class AbstractPunishment
      Throws:
      PunishmentException

    • getType

      @NotNull public abstract @NotNull StandardPunishmentType getType()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns the type of this punishment. By default, this is a field from StandardPunishmentType.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the type of this punishment
      See Also:
      • StandardPunishmentType

    • applyPunishment

      protected CompletableFuture<Punishment> applyPunishment() throws PunishmentException
      Specified by:
      applyPunishment in class AbstractPunishment
      Throws:
      PunishmentException

    • setSuccessor

      @NotNull public @NotNull CompletableFuture<Punishment> setSuccessor(Punishment successor)
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Sets the successor of this punishment. This is used to chain punishments so that one punishment of the same kind is paused until the previous one is finished. This may especially be useful for punishments of differing reasons. After calling this method, do not access the data of successor anymore as it may be changed. Instead, use Punishment.getSuccessor() or Punishment.getSuccessorOrNull() as soon as the future completes.
      Specified by:
      setSuccessor in interface Punishment
      Parameters:
      successor - the successor of this punishment or null to remove the successor
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing this punishment with the successor set

    • totalDuration

      @NotNull public @NotNull PunishmentDuration totalDuration()
      Description copied from interface: TemporalPunishment
      Returns the total duration of this punishment from Punishment.getCreationTime() until the expiration date.
      Specified by:
      totalDuration in interface TemporalPunishment
      Returns:
      the total duration of this punishment
